title: Implement missing grep_source tool executor
summary: The grep_source tool is defined but not implemented in the executor, returning "Unknown tool" when called. This adds the missing case handler that searches src/ directory using ripgrep-like syntax with pattern matching, context, and file filtering.

affectedFiles.description: Add grep_source case handler to executeTool switch statement

estimatedImpact: Unblocks critical source code search capability; enables codebase analysis workflows
executorPrompt: Insert the grep_source case handler after line 522 in src/gateway/agents-runtime/subagent-executor.ts. The handler searches src/ directory recursively for patterns matching the provided regex, with support for glob filtering, path limiting, context lines, and case-insensitive matching. Test that it compiles without syntax errors.
